papers.title: Spatial transcriptomics redraws the olfactory map
papers.abstract: Two studies in this issue of Cell, by Bintu et al. and Brann et al., overturn the long-standing zonal model of olfactory receptor organization. Using image-based spatial transcriptomics, they reveal that receptors occupy reproducible positions along continuous gradients, coupling receptor choice to axonal targeting through a shared molecular code.
papers.titleZh: 空間轉錄體學重新繪製嗅覺地圖
papers.summaryZh: 長期以來，科學家認為嗅覺受體的分布遵循分區模型。然而，發表於《Cell》的兩項研究——Bintu 團隊與 Brann 團隊——利用影像型空間轉錄體學技術，推翻了這個經典模型。他們發現嗅覺受體其實分布於沿連續梯度變化的可重複位置上，而非過去認為的離散區域。這項發現將受體類型的選擇與軸突導向精確地連結起來，揭示兩者共享同一套分子密碼。這項研究不僅重新定義了我們對嗅覺系統神經線路形成的理解，也為探索其他感覺系統的組織原理提供了新的框架。

papers.title: Autoantibodies in long COVID: A mechanistic foothold in a heterogeneous disease
papers.abstract: Long COVID is a heterogeneous, multi-system disease that poses challenges for patients, health systems, and economies. Two papers in Cell and Cell Reports Medicine from independent groups suggest that autoantibodies in a subset of long COVID patients can directly drive symptoms such as pain, fatigue, or neurocognitive problems.
papers.titleZh: 自體抗體與長新冠：異質性疾病中的關鍵機制線索
papers.summaryZh: 長新冠是一種異質性的多系統疾病，對患者、醫療系統和經濟構成重大挑戰。兩項來自不同研究團隊的研究（分別發表於Cell及Cell Reports Medicine）發現，部分長新冠患者體內的自體抗體可直接誘發疼痛、疲勞或神經認知問題等症狀。這項發現為理解長新冠的潛在致病機制提供了重要突破口。由於長新冠症狀表現多樣且病因不明，此研究確立的自體抗體角色可作為未來藥物開發的關鍵靶點，為廣大長新冠患者帶來新的治療希望。

papers.title: B cells just got a workout
papers.abstract: In this issue of Cell, Mao et al. reveal that B cells play an unexpected, immune-independent role in exercise physiology by facilitating multi-organ communication. Secreting TGF-β1, they transcriptionally reprogram hepatic glutamine metabolism via GLS2 and SLC7A5, preserving skeletal muscle glutamate levels, which sustain mitochondrial function, Ca2⁺ signaling, and ATP production, enhancing exercise capacity.
papers.titleZh: B細胞在運動中的意外角色
papers.summaryZh: 免疫細胞B細胞竟在運動生理中扮演關鍵角色。本研究發現，B細胞分泌的TGF-β1能夠轉錄重編程肝臟的穀氨醯胺代謝途徑，透過GLS2和SLC7A5維持骨骼肌中的麩胺酸濃度，進而支持粒線體功能、鈣離子訊號傳導與ATP生成，最終提升運動表現。這項發現顛覆了B細胞僅具免疫功能的傳統認知，揭示其在多器官溝通中的重要作用。

papers.title: Mesenchymal drift: A convergent framework for the hallmarks of aging
papers.abstract: Aging is marked by a systemic loss of tissue homeostasis. This review focuses on mesenchymal drift, where cells progressively lose lineage identity and acquire mesenchymal traits, as a convergent framework that integrates and fuels the hallmarks of aging, forming a potentially targetable molecular network to restore identity and counter multiple age-related pathologies.
papers.titleZh: 間質漂移：老化標誌的整合框架
papers.summaryZh: 老化以組織恆態的系統性喪失為特徵。本综述聚焦於「間質漂移」現象，即細胞逐漸失去譜系特異性並獲得間質細胞特質，作為一個統合框架來整合並驅動老化標誌的各項特徵。此框架揭示了一個可靶向的分子網絡，有潛力恢復細胞身份並對抗多種年齡相關疾病，為延緩老化進程提供新的治療策略。

papers.title: A causal link between autoantibodies and neurological symptoms in long COVID
papers.abstract: Passive transfer of IgG from long COVID patients induces pain behavior accompanied by intraepidermal nerve fiber damage in mice.
papers.titleZh: 自體抗體與長新冠神經症狀的因果關聯
papers.summaryZh: 長新冠患者常見持續性神經系統症狀，但其致病機制長期不明。本研究將長新冠患者的IgG被動轉移至小鼠，發現可誘發疼痛行為並造成皮膚神經纖維損傷，首次直接證實自體抗體與神經症狀之間的因果關聯。此發現不僅闡明長新冠神經症狀的病理機制，也為開發針對自體抗體的治療策略提供重要理論依據。

papers.title: Multitasking sponges
papers.titleZh: 多功能海綿：海洋生態系統的多重任務者
papers.summaryZh: 海綿是淺海及深海生態系中的關鍵基礎物種，本研究揭示了海綿如何同時執行多項重要的生態功能。本論文可能探討海綿在棲息地提供、水質過濾、養分循環及與其他物種共生互動等多面向的角色。這些發現有助於我們理解海綿如何維持海洋生態系統的穩定性與生物多樣性。隨著海洋環境面臨氣候變遷與人為壓力，本研究對於評估海綿生態系服務及制定海洋保護策略具有重要參考價值。

papers.title: Ancient strep throat
papers.summaryZh: 本研究透過古代DNA分析，在古代人類遺骸中發現了鏈球菌感染的分子證據，為了解歷史傳染病的流行提供了直接證據。這項發現挑戰了我們對古代疾病負擔的認知，顯示呼吸道感染可能對史前人群造成重大影響。研究人員成功重建了古代病原體的基因組序列，使我們能夠追蹤鏈球菌的演化歷程與致病性的變遷。此類古病原體學研究不僅豐富了我們對人類與病原體共同演化歷史的理解，也為現代傳染病的防控提供了演化學上的參考框架。

papers.title: Transcription-independent induction of rapid-onset senescence is integral to healing
papers.abstract: Cellular senescence plays key roles in tissue repair, tumour suppression and ageing. Here we identify a rapid, transcription‑independent senescence response in skin following injury. Within minutes to hours after wounding, skin cells at the edge of injury display hallmark features of senescence. This response involves the utilization of pre‑existing Cdkn1a mRNA through the removal of nuclear export inhibitors, which enables Cdkn1a transcript translation and rapid p21 protein accumulation. These cells enter stable cell‑cycle arrest and secrete pro‑migratory and pro‑inflammatory factors that promote tissue repair, including re‑epithelialization. Experimental suppression of this rapid senescence, either genetically or pharmacologically, markedly delays wound closure, whereas inhibition during later phases of repair has no effect. Our findings establish rapid‑onset senescence as a mechanistic requirement for efficient tissue regeneration. Valdivieso, Rozmaric et al. show that wounding rapidly induces a senescent state in skin cells involving p21 protein induction, without the need for new transcription. These senescent cells are beneficial to early stages of healing.
papers.titleZh: 轉錄非依賴性快速衰老：傷口癒合的關鍵機制
papers.summaryZh: 細胞衰老在組織修復、腫瘤抑制和老化過程中扮演重要角色。本研究發現，皮膚受損後數分鐘至數小時內，傷口邊緣的細胞會迅速展現衰老特徵，且無需新轉錄即可達成。此過程涉及利用既有的Cdkn1a mRNA，通過移除核輸出抑制劑，使Cdkn1a轉錄本得以翻譯並快速累積p21蛋白。這些衰老細胞進入穩定的細胞週期停滯，並分泌促進細胞遷移和發炎的因素，有助於組織修復和再上皮化。抑制此快速衰老反應會延遲傷口閉合，證實快速衰老是有效組織再生的必要機制。

papers.title: A sulfated bile acid from microbes calms sepsis
papers.abstract: Deoxycholic acid 3-sulfate, a sulfated bile acid primarily produced by a gut commensal bacterium, Enterococcus raffinosus, strengthens the intestinal barrier, dampens inflammation and protects against paediatric sepsis in mice models.
papers.titleZh: 微生物來源的硫酸化膽汁酸可緩解敗血症
papers.summaryZh: 這項研究發現，由腸道共生菌——糞腸球菌（Enterococcus raffinosus）產生的硫酸化膽汁酸——去氧膽酸3-硫酸酯（DCA-3S），能夠強化腸道屏障、抑制發炎反應，並在小鼠模型中保護嬰幼兒免於敗血症。此發現揭示了腸道微生物影響全身性發炎反應的全新機制，為敗血症的治療提供了以微生物體為基礎的策略性新方向。由於敗血症是危及生命的重症，此研究結果具有重要的臨床應用潛力。

papers.title: Gene therapies to fix failing hearts gain steam after years in the doldrums
papers.abstract: Treatments aim to bulk up failing hearts to restore their vigour – but can the field move on from past controversy?

papers.title: A Hormone Cell Atlas maps the human endocrine system at cellular resolution
papers.abstract: Hormones act across tissues and organs to coordinate physiological functions. Drawing inspiration from the Human Cell Atlas, we analyzed expression of 379 hormone and receptor genes in a transcriptomic dataset comprising 14 million single cells and nuclei across 47 human tissues. Using hormone2cell, we mapped putative hormone-producing and hormone-receiving cell types, defining tissue-specific and cross-tissue endocrine signatures. We predicted non-classical sites of hormone expression, including secretin in plasmacytoid dendritic cells, inferred convergent hormone action and endocrine feedback loops, and implicated cell populations in monogenic endocrine disorders. In a cross-tissue integration of adipocyte datasets, we uncovered dynamic endocrine programs across depots, within adipocyte subtypes and through adipogenic differentiation. Cumulatively, the Hormone Cell Atlas ( hormonecellatlas.org.uk ) provides a comprehensive framework for dissecting hormonal impact on health and disease.
papers.titleZh: 荷爾蒙細胞圖譜：以細胞解析度繪製人體內分泌系統
papers.summaryZh: 本研究參考人類細胞圖譜的架構，分析了47種人體組織中1,400萬個單細胞的轉錄體數據，涵蓋379個荷爾蒙與受體基因，建構出全面的荷爾蒙細胞圖譜。透過激素與細胞的對應分析，團隊系統性描繪出組織特異性與跨組織的內分泌特徵，並預測了多個非典型荷爾蒙表現位置，如在漿細胞樣樹突狀細胞中發現的分泌素表現。此圖譜不僅能推斷荷爾蒙的作用網絡與負回饋迴路，還能連結特定細胞群體與單基因內分泌疾病的關聯，為代謝性疾病與內分泌失調的研究提供重要參考框架。

papers.title: Breaking the membrane heredity paradox through de novo protocell formation
papers.abstract: A central paradigm in biology is that cellular membranes descend from a common ancestral membrane, and it is currently unclear whether lipid membranes can arise from membrane-less precursors. In this study, the authors demonstrate the de novo generation of lipid bilayers in the absence of any pre-existing membranes, membrane-bound proteins, or lipid nanostructure templates.
papers.titleZh: 打破膜遺傳悖論：從頭合成原細胞膜
papers.summaryZh: 生物學中有一個核心典範，認為細胞膜源自共同祖先膜，但目前仍不清楚脂雙層是否能從無膜前驅物生成。本研究作者展示在沒有任何既存膜、膜蛋白或奈米結構模板的情況下，可從頭生成脂雙層。這項發現挑戰了膜遺傳的傳統觀點，可能為早期細胞演化提供新的理解。研究成果對於了解生命起源及合成生物學的應用具有重要意義。

papers.title: Metabolic characterization of the tumor microenvironment orchestrates therapeutic strategies and clinical outcomes in pancreatic cancer
papers.abstract: Metabolic reprogramming and the tumor microenvironment (TME) shape pancreatic cancer progression and treatment response. Here, the authors map cell–type–specific metabolic and TME features to define three tumor subtypes with distinct immune profiles and differential responses to existing and proposed therapeutic strategies.
papers.titleZh: 胰臟癌腫瘤微環境的代謝特徵：治療策略與臨床預後的調控機制
papers.summaryZh: 胰臟癌的代謝重編程與腫瘤微環境是影響疾病進展和治療反應的關鍵因素。本研究繪製了細胞型特異性的代謝與腫瘤微環境特徵，定義出三種具有不同免疫特徵的腫瘤亞型。這些亞型與現有及新興治療策略的療效差異有顯著相關性。此發現有助於發展個人化治療，並為胰臟癌的精準醫療提供新的生物標記與治療靶點。

paper.title: Share the highs and lows of your career in science: take Nature’s global survey
Bridget Ogilvie obituary: parasitologist who championed biomedical labs and scientific evidence
Bridging quantum mechanics to liquid properties via a universal organic force field
paper.abstract: The authors present ByteFF-Pol, a force field trained solely on quantum data to accurately predict liquid and electrolyte properties. It bridges the gap between microscopic calculations and materials design without experimental calibration.

paper.title: Photonic-integrated quantum sensor array for microscale magnetic localisation
paper.abstract: Arrays of NV centres operating in parallel promise advantages in resolving spatio-temporal dynamics. Here, the authors report an array of eight localised NV-ensemble sensors integrated in silicon nitride photonic circuits with simultaneous readout and demonstrate applications to magnetic localisation and position tracking.

paper.title: North Atlantic influence reconciling model-observation discrepancy in the tropical Pacific warming pattern
paper.abstract: This study shows that climate models underestimate the strengthening of the Pacific east–west temperature contrast observed in recent decades. The mismatch arises from poorly represented North Atlantic warming influences on the tropical Pacific in the models, but correcting spatial biases improves agreement with observations.

paper.title: Miocene ocean circulation shifted expansive oxygen deficient zones to the Atlantic
paper.abstract: Distributions of expansive low oxygen waters during the Miocene Climatic Optimum greenhouse interval (14.7-17 million years ago) were flipped compared to today, with low oxygen waters engulfing much of the Equatorial Atlantic but contracted in the Pacific.

paper.title: Retraction Note: Daylight saving time affects European mortality patterns
paper.abstract: Retraction Note: Daylight saving time affects European mortality patterns
